title: Prepare a landscape design
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare a landscape design demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a design brief

pcs.text: Consult with client to establish purpose and requirements of design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to establish purpose and requirements of design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to establish purpose and requirements of design.

pcs.text: Interpret and incorporate architectural designs, styles and details into design brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and incorporate architectural designs, styles and details into design brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and incorporate architectural designs, styles and details into design brief.

pcs.text: Develop design criteria and design brief, and consult with client to finalise agreement of brief and construction budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop design criteria and design brief, and consult with client to finalise agreement of brief and construction budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop design criteria and design brief, and consult with client to finalise agreement of brief and construction budget.

pcs.text: Negotiate cost structures of design development and timelines with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Negotiate cost structures of design development and timelines with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate cost structures of design development and timelines with client.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop a design brief

elements.title: Assess the project site

pcs.text: Inspect site of the landscape project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site of the landscape project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site of the landscape project.

pcs.text: Record physical elements and features of site on base plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record physical elements and features of site on base plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record physical elements and features of site on base plan.

pcs.text: Assess soil conditions, topography, aspect, existing vegetation and climatic factors and record on site analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess soil conditions, topography, aspect, existing vegetation and climatic factors and record on site analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess soil conditions, topography, aspect, existing vegetation and climatic factors and record on site analysis.

pcs.text: Complete functional analysis of existing site and record on base plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete functional analysis of existing site and record on base plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete functional analysis of existing site and record on base plan.

pcs.text: Assess any other relevant information and record on site analysis or base plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess any other relevant information and record on site analysis or base plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess any other relevant information and record on site analysis or base plan.

pcs.text: Research and identify opportunities and constraints on development including local council, legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and identify opportunities and constraints on development including local council, legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and identify opportunities and constraints on development including local council, legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess the project site

elements.title: Prepare a concept design

pcs.text: Prepare concept to illustrate location and layout of proposed landscape works according to design brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare concept to illustrate location and layout of proposed landscape works according to design brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare concept to illustrate location and layout of proposed landscape works according to design brief.

pcs.text: Specify hard landscaping requirements, including irrigation, demolition and removal of existing features and installation of new works

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify hard landscaping requirements, including irrigation, demolition and removal of existing features and installation of new works.

pcs.text: Compile planting schedules for incorporation into design plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile planting schedules for incorporation into design plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile planting schedules for incorporation into design plan.

pcs.text: Apply industry practice and consistent graphic styles to concept design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply industry practice and consistent graphic styles to concept design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply industry practice and consistent graphic styles to concept design.

pcs.text: Consult with client to establish agreement on options and approaches for design development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to establish agreement on options and approaches for design development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to establish agreement on options and approaches for design development.

pcs.text: Select materials, surface treatments and plants

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, surface treatments and plants.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify construction and drainage requirements, and seek specialist advice where required.

pcs.text: Discuss design development documentation with client and seek agreement

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss design development documentation with client and seek agreement.

elements.title: Produce a final design

pcs.text: Include specifications, detail drawings and notes on design to assist interpretation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Include specifications, detail drawings and notes on design to assist interpretation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Include specifications, detail drawings and notes on design to assist interpretation.

pcs.text: Finalise and document detailed design plan according to design brief, concept design and client consultations using industry standard graphic, text and layout styles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Finalise and document detailed design plan according to design brief, concept design and client consultations using industry standard graphic, text and layout styles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Finalise and document detailed design plan according to design brief, concept design and client consultations using industry standard graphic, text and layout styles.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present final design to client.
